title: spermacoce neotenuis
intro: Spermacoce neotenuis, also known as "false buttonweed", is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Spermacoce neotenuis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Spermacoce neotenuis is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
